Caption: A qualitative example of the shape of the non-linear relationship that can bind cycle number and SoH [22].
Electric (a) and thermal (b) models of the battery.
A schema of the overall structure interacting with the controller. The arrows’ directions denote the convention adopted for positive values of the power exchanged by each component.

Average performance in terms of profit (left), battery cost (center), and energy profit (right) over 8 years experiments, shown by fixing as 0 the results of the SoC20/80 agent ( 10 runs, higher is better).
